# DealRadar — machine-readable surfaces (llms.txt)

DealRadar is a price-deals catalog (verified genuine discounts, DE market).

## Agent markdown surface

Every deal page has a markdown twin with pinned field labels
(Price:, Was:, Availability:, Shop:, Brand:, GTIN:, MPN:, Attributes, Images,
Disclosure:):

- HTML:     https://dealradar.me/en/deal/<slug>
- Markdown: https://dealradar.me/en/deal/<slug>/md

## Discovery

The full enumerable set of deal URLs is the sitemap index:
https://dealradar.me/sitemap.xml — append `/md` to any listed deal URL for its
markdown document. Hidden/expired deals answer 200 with a noindex signal.

## Structured data

Every deal page embeds schema.org Product JSON-LD (image array, offers,
gtin/mpn/sku, additionalProperty from real feed attributes only — nothing
fabricated).

## Contact

Imprint: https://dealradar.me/en/imprint
